name: @agup/cli
description: Declarative CLI for managing Claude Managed Agent resources
author: Speria Inc.

scripts.build: bun build src/index.ts --target=node --outdir=dist --minify --external @agup/core && printf '#!/usr/bin/env node\n' | cat - dist/index.js > dist/tmp.js && mv dist/tmp.js dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
